# Gitleaks fixture file — for testing that the gitleaks hook works.
#
# This file is allowlisted in .gitleaks.toml so gitleaks will not scan it.
# scripts/verify-gitleaks.sh uses this file to set up the test scenario.
#
# The verify script creates a temporary file with the actual test key content
# and stages it to prove gitleaks blocks it. See scripts/verify-gitleaks.sh.
FIXTURE_LABEL=gitleaks-test-fixture
FIXTURE_PURPOSE=verify-aws-access-key-detection
